news.headline: Celebrity ‘Trump’ buffalo spared sacrifice, sent to Bangladesh zoo
news.summary:
A buffalo in Bangladesh nicknamed “Donald Trump” for its flowing blond hair has been spared from sacrifice after shooting to fame, and will instead be cared for at the national zoo.

news.headline: After Decades on the Run, a Leftist Militant Is Sentenced in Germany
news.summary: Daniela Klette, 67, was part of the Red Army Faction, which attacked American and capitalist interests until the 1990s. She was convicted of robberies committed later to finance life as a fugitive.

news.headline: DR Congo seek World Cup ticket refunds after Ebola outbreak
news.summary: DR Congo fans hoping to watch their side's return to the World Cup face a major hurdle as the US imposes travel restrictions following the latest Ebola outbreak.

news.headline: Europe: New far-right generation turns away from Putin
news.summary: 🇺🇦🇷🇺 "The image of Putin as the great power is totally gone."Thibault Muzergues tells #F24Debate the new generation of European right-wing politicians are distancing themselves from Russia, turning instead towards #Ukraine
